recommendations.title: Faces Places
recommendations.overview: Director Agnès Varda and photographer/muralist JR journey through rural France and form an unlikely friendship.

recommendations.title: Black Box
recommendations.overview: After losing his wife and his memory in a car accident, a single father undergoes an experimental treatment that causes him to question who he really is.

recommendations.title: Quick Change
recommendations.overview: With the aid of his girlfriend, Phyllis Potter, and best friend, Loomis, Grimm enters a Manhattan bank dressed as a clown, creates a hostage situation and executes a flawless robbery. The only thing left for the trio to do is make their getaway out o

recommendations.title: Catch Me If You Can
recommendations.overview: A true story about Frank Abagnale Jr. who, before his 19th birthday, successfully conned millions of dollars worth of checks as a Pan Am pilot, doctor, and legal prosecutor. An FBI agent makes it his mission to put him behind bars. But Frank not only

recommendations.title: Dog Day Afternoon
recommendations.overview: Based on the true story of would-be Brooklyn bank robbers John Wojtowicz and Salvatore Naturile. Sonny and Sal attempt a bank heist which quickly turns sour and escalates into a hostage situation and stand-off with the police. As Sonny's motives for

recommendations.title: White Boy Rick
recommendations.overview: The story of Richard Wershe Jr., a teenager who became an undercover informant for the police during the 1980s, and was ultimately arrested for drug trafficking and sentenced to life in prison.

recommendations.title: How to Rob a Bank
recommendations.overview: Caught in the middle of a bank robbery, a slacker and a bank employee become the ones who arbitrate the intense situation.

recommendations.title: Breaking
recommendations.overview: Desperate for money and running out of options, Marine veteran Brian Brown-Easley holds several people hostage inside a bank, setting the stage for a tense confrontation with police.

recommendations.title: Son of a Gun
recommendations.overview: Locked up for a minor crime, 19 year old JR quickly learns the harsh realities of prison life. Protection, if you can get it, is paramount. JR soon finds himself under the watchful eye of Australia's most notorious criminal, Brendan Lynch, but protec

recommendations.title: The 12th Man
recommendations.overview: After a failed anti-Nazi sabotage mission leaves his eleven comrades dead, a Norwegian resistance fighter finds himself fleeing the Gestapo through the snowbound reaches of Scandinavia.
